experiment_title: 苯与甲苯与水和浓硫酸混合行为的对比实验

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="苯与甲苯与水和浓硫酸混合行为的对比实验" goal="比较苯和甲苯与水及浓硫酸混合时的分层与混溶性差异" difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="test_tube_1" type="test_tube" capacity="10mL" />
      <Component id="test_tube_2" type="test_tube" capacity="10mL" />
      <Component id="graduated_cylinder" type="graduated_cylinder" capacity="10mL" />
      <Component id="dropper" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="test_tube_rack" type="rack" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="Benzene" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Toluene" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Distilled_Water" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Concentrated_Sulfuric_Acid" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      
      <Attach vessel="test_tube_1" support="test_tube_rack" id="step_0" />
      <Attach vessel="test_tube_2" support="test_tube_rack" id="step_1" />
      
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="C6H6" volume="2 mL" tool="graduated_cylinder" id="step_2" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_2" reagent="C7H8" volume="2 mL" tool="graduated_cylinder" id="step_3" />
      
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="H2O" volume="0.2 mL" tool="dropper" id="step_4" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_2" reagent="H2O" volume="0.2 mL" tool="dropper" id="step_5" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_6" />
      
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_7" />
      
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="H2SO4" volume="0.2 mL" tool="dropper" id="step_8" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_2" reagent="H2SO4" volume="0.2 mL" tool="dropper" id="step_9" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_10" />
      
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_11" />
      
      <Stir vessel="test_tube_1" id="step_12" />
      <Stir vessel="test_tube_2" id="step_13" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_14" />
      
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 准备实验器材，将两支试管分别放入试管架中，为后续实验做准备。
分别向两支试管中准确加入苯和甲苯，作为对比实验的有机相。
向两支试管中分别加入蒸馏水，静置观察苯和甲苯与水的混溶性和分层现象。
在静置后分别向两支试管中加入浓硫酸，继续观察分层与混溶性变化。
搅拌两支试管，进一步观察苯和甲苯与水及浓硫酸混合后的最终状态。
